data_gaps.message: Available room night fields are missing, so OCC, RevPAR, and Net RevPAR are not calculable.
Commission amount or commission rate fields are missing, so commission-after revenue is not calculable.
Net revenue fields are missing and cannot be derived without commission data.
Booking date and check-in date fields are missing, so lead time is not calculable.
Cancellation fields are not present in OTA daily facts.
Cancel room night fields are missing, so room-night cancellation rate is not calculable.
Competitor price fields are not present in OTA daily facts.

totals.cancellation_rate.caliber: sum(fact_ota_daily.cancel_order_num) / sum(fact_ota_daily.order_count), or avg(fact_ota_daily.cancel_rate) when platform rate is supplied

competitor_price.rows.caliber: count(fact_ota_daily rows with our_price and competitor_price)

traffic_source_readiness.p0_pre_import_evidence_policy: External traffic evidence is source proof only; P0 closure still requires target-date traffic rows and ready verifier status.

capture_evidence.required: desensitized source_trace_id plus source_url_hash matched to each traffic row and field fact

source_path.required: structured source_path for every required traffic metric

metric_key.required: required traffic metric keys are present in field facts

storage_field.required: expected online_daily_data storage field for every required metric

stored_value.required: stored value present for every required traffic metric

ui_status.required: ready UI field_fact_status with no raw_data exposure

traffic_source_readiness.p0_traffic_closure_chain_policy: Every chain item is OTA-channel evidence only and remains incomplete until the P0 field-loop verifier returns ready.
traffic_source_readiness.p0_platform_hotel_identifier_policy: P0 traffic rows must prove the OTA platform hotel identifier through importer/verifier checks; UI exposes only status and source family, not raw IDs.
traffic_source_readiness.p0_source_chain_policy: Target-date source rows include traffic/flow/conversion data types; P0 closure still requires ready verifier status.

employee_questions.question: 今天 OTA 数据有没有采到
employee_questions.employee_detail: 目标日携程和美团 OTA 数据均有入库证据；最近可用数据只作参考。

employee_questions.question: 哪些字段可信

employee_questions.question: 哪些字段缺失

missing_field_summary.label: 可售房晚缺失
missing_field_summary.source_text: 数据缺口 / 字段缺口
missing_field_summary.business_impact: 缺可售房晚，暂不能可靠计算 OCC、RevPAR 或可售基准。
missing_field_summary.next_action: 按字段资产核对平台返回和入库字段，再重跑收益指标核验。
missing_field_summary.policy: 显式保留缺口；不使用 0、空值或成功状态替代。

missing_field_summary.label: 佣金字段缺失
missing_field_summary.source_text: 数据缺口 / 字段缺口
missing_field_summary.business_impact: 缺佣金金额或佣金率，暂不能核算净收入和渠道成本。
missing_field_summary.next_action: 按字段资产核对平台返回和入库字段，再重跑收益指标核验。
missing_field_summary.policy: 显式保留缺口；不使用 0、空值或成功状态替代。

missing_field_summary.policy: 显式保留缺口；不使用 0、空值或成功状态替代。

metric_domain_summary.source_text: 目标日源数据 1 行 / 流量事实 1 行
metric_domain_summary.traffic_source_text: 目标日流量事实已入库

metric_domain_summary.problem: 收益、流量、转化均可复核。
metric_domain_summary.next_action: 可进入 OTA 经营诊断。
metric_domain_summary.policy: 只读目标日 OTA 指标域 / 流量/转化；缺失时不输出确定结论。

employee_questions.employee_detail: 运营动作已追溯到 OTA 诊断，并有审批、执行证据、复盘或 ROI 信号。

closure_summary.protected_boundary: 不改变携程/美团手动或自动获取逻辑，不改变获取字段和字段映射；证据不足时不生成确定经营结论。
